steps.title: Interpret the exponent
steps.content: The exponent is $\frac{x}{12}$, so increasing $x$ by $12$ months increases the exponent by $1$.

steps.title: Read the yearly multiplier
steps.content: Each year, the value is multiplied by $0.27$. That means the machine keeps $27\%$ of its value each year.

steps.title: Find the percent decrease
steps.content: If $27\%$ is kept, then $100\%-27\%=73\%$ is lost. Thus $p=73$, which matches the correct answer.
